reason: This session's Task 17 revealed that injection.config.dart can become stale when tasks incrementally add @injectable/@singleton annotations but don't re-run build_runner. The stale DI config caused runtime failures only when real widget code exercised the DI resolution (getIt<Bloc>() calls in the app shell), not in unit tests that provide mocks. This is a phased-build-specific lesson about code generation tracking.
